privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring OpenBCI GUI's Networking widget with Stream 1 using LSL protocol for TimeSeries data, and Stream 2 using OSC protocol for FFT data on IP 127.0.0.1 and port 12345. The agent must start the streams and save a screenshot to /home/ga/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/networking_config.png. These requirements are verified by inspecting the task description, export_result.sh port checks, and verifier.py evaluation criteria.
